title: Responsive Web Design: Build for Everyone
description: A practice-first path through modern HTML, CSS, accessibility, responsive design, and five certification projects. Covers every module in freeCodeCamp Responsive Web Design v9 with original theory, workshops, labs, quizzes, and a final exam.

chapters.title: Chapter 1: Web and HTML Foundations
chapters.description: Understand browser tooling, valid documents, links, images, and media.

chapters.title: Chapter 2: Semantic Content, Forms, and Tables
chapters.description: Structure meaningful content, collect data, and complete first certification project.

chapters.title: Chapter 3: HTML Accessibility and Review
chapters.description: Build keyboard-friendly HTML and debug document problems.

chapters.title: Chapter 4: CSS, Design, Units, and Color
chapters.description: Learn cascade mechanics and core visual design decisions.

chapters.title: Chapter 5: States, Forms, and the Box Model
Chapter 6: Flexbox and Typography
chapters.description: Build one-dimensional layouts, card project, and readable type.

chapters.title: Chapter 7: Accessible CSS, Positioning, and Selectors
chapters.description: Protect accessibility while building advanced layouts and inventory project.

chapters.title: Chapter 8: Responsive Design Systems
chapters.description: Build responsive docs and maintainable theme systems.

chapters.title: Chapter 9: Grid, Product Project, and Motion
chapters.description: Finish with two-dimensional layout, capstone page, animation, and review.

author: LEARN-IT-ALL
